etymology.description: semantic ็ณธ(็ณธ) (mรฌ, "silk; thread") + phonetic ใกญ (jรฌ) -> coat, overcoat; originally related to ็นผ(็นผ) (jรฌ, "to continue")
etymology.interpretation: The character ใกญ originally relates to ็นผ(็นผ) (jรฌ, "to continue"), where a thread weaves continuity. Here, it is used primarily for phonetic purposes, contributing its sound to the reading of ็นผ but loses its original context when referencing a coat or overcoat.
